channel.title: nam · backend dev
channel.description: Notes, articles and thoughts from a backend developer

item.title: Build the Incident Timeline Before the Fix
item.description: The fastest way to waste incident time is to optimize the wrong story. Write the timeline first.

item.title: Retries Need a Budget
item.description: Retries are useful right up until they become a second outage. Give them a budget, not blind optimism.

item.title: Healthy Dashboards Stay Quiet
item.description: A good dashboard should narrow your search space quickly, not wallpaper the screen with permanent anxiety.

item.title: Lecture 1 - The Learning Problem
item.description: A comprehensive beginner's guide to understanding the learning problem in machine learning, covering key concepts, types of learning, feasibility, error measures, and practical exercises.

item.title: Lecture 2 - Is Learning Feasible?
item.description: A Complete Beginner's Guide to Understanding Learning Theory

item.title: Lecture 3 - Linear Models in Machine Learning
item.description: A Complete Beginner's Guide to Understanding Linear Models in Machine Learning

item.title: Lecture 4 - Error and Noise
item.description: A Complete Beginner's Guide to Understanding Error and Noise

item.title: The Learning Problem - Beginner's Guide
item.description: A comprehensive beginner's guide to understanding the learning problem in machine learning, covering key concepts, types of learning, feasibility, error measures, and practical exercises.

item.title: Java Streams API Guide
item.description: Master the Java Streams API for functional-style operations on collections

item.title: ELK Index Lifecycle Management (ILM) Strategy Guide
item.description: A comprehensive guide to managing log indices in an ELK stack using Index Lifecycle Management

item.title: Getting Started with Spring Boot
item.description: A comprehensive guide to building your first Spring Boot application
